text.title: Autonomous Agents Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent take any irreversible action (prod write, payment, send, delete)?

branch.when: irreversible == true AND human_gate == true AND success_signal == true

conclusion.verdict: Ship autonomous between gates; human checkpoint at each irreversible step.

branch.when: irreversible == true AND human_gate == true AND success_signal == false

conclusion.verdict: Escalate — autonomous loop without success signal and with irreversible actions is too risky.
Add human checkpoint before any irreversible call; do not ship without it.
Ship fully autonomous; iteration caps + idempotent tools.
Sandbox first; never run code execution without isolation.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
